tasks.subject: Task 0: InterpolationError exception
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the interp error type (mirror UpscaleFailed). Files: core/errors.py + tests/test_errors_interpolation.py. Verify: pixi run pytest tests/test_errors_interpolation.py -v.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/errors.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_errors_interpolation.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["InterpolationError subclasses KinoforgeError with job_id+server_error"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: ffprobe_fps frame-rate probe
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ffprobe_fps parses rational r_frame_rate to float. Files: core/frames.py + tests/test_frames_ffprobe_fps.py. Verify: pixi run pytest tests/test_frames_ffprobe_fps.py -v.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/frames.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_frames_ffprobe_fps.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parses rational to float", "raises on bad/zero-denom", "argv targets r_frame_rate"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: fps_resolver — engine-agnostic foundation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure resolve_fps_target → FpsPlan (passthrough/decimate/arbitrary-schedule/recursive-depth). Files: core/fps_resolver.py + tests/test_fps_resolver.py. Verify: pixi run pytest tests/test_fps_resolver.py -v.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/fps_resolver.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_fps_resolver.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["passthrough/decimate/arbitrary/recursive branches", "target<=0 ValueError"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: decimate_video_fps — ffmpeg re-timing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** decimate_video_fps ffmpeg fps filter over temp-file input (not pipe:0). Files: pipeline/decimate.py + tests/pipeline/test_decimate.py. Verify: pixi run pytest tests/pipeline/test_decimate.py -v.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/decimate.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/pipeline/test_decimate.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fps filter over temp-file not pipe:0", "NTSC exact", "real-ffmpeg hits target"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: InterpolatorEngine interface + registry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** InterpolateJob/Result + InterpolatorEngine ABC + registry trio. Files: core/interfaces.py, core/registry.py + tests/core/test_interpolator_registry.py. Verify: pixi run pytest tests/core/test_interpolator_registry.py -v.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/core/registry.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_interpolator_registry.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["job/result dataclasses", "ABC parallel to UpscalerEngine + capability", "registry mirrors upscaler"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: InterpolateStage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stage routes upshift→engine, downshift→local decimate, equal→passthrough, remote→engine. Files: pipeline/interpolate.py + tests/pipeline/test_interpolate_stage.py. Verify: pixi run pytest tests/pipeline/test_interpolate_stage.py -v.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/interpolate.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/pipeline/test_interpolate_stage.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 routing cases", "writes interpolated artifact"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Config surface — interpolate: block
tasks.description:
**Goal:** RifeEngineConfig + InterpolateConfig + Config.interpolate + capability_key wiring. Files: core/config.py + tests/test_config_interpolate.py. Verify: pixi run pytest tests/test_config_interpolate.py -v.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_config_interpolate.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fps>0 + rife-block-required", "precision allowlist", "capability_key backward-compatible"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Orchestrator wiring (standalone path only)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append InterpolateStage + materialize interpolated artifact; NO inter-stage refactor. Files: core/orchestrator.py + tests/core/test_orchestrator_interpolate.py. Verify: pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_interpolate.py -v then full pixi run test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_interpolate.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["stage appended", "interpolated materialized+published", "standalone returns interpolated", "no-interp unaffected"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: CLI — kinoforge interpolate subcommand
tasks.description:
**Goal:** interpolate subparser + _cmd_interpolate (mirror upscale). Files: cli/_main.py, cli/_commands.py + tests/cli/test_cmd_interpolate.py. Verify: pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_interpolate.py -v.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py", "src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_interpolate.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["subparser flags", "exit-2 gates", "--fps override + dry-run", "non-dry-run drives generate skip_clip_stage+initial_clip"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: RifeEngine client (HTTP to pod)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** RifeEngine InterpolatorEngine impl (upload+POST+poll+result) + render_provision + self-register. Files: interpolators/rife/*.py + tests/interpolators/test_rife_engine.py. Verify: pixi run pytest tests/interpolators/test_rife_engine.py -v. EXEC-TIME TODO: pin Practical-RIFE SHA + confirm weights layout.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/interpolators/rife/_engine.py", "src/kinoforge/interpolators/rife/__init__.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/interpolators/test_rife_engine.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["upload+POST+poll+result", "error→InterpolationError", "validate/model_identity/capability", "self-registered rife"], "modelTier": "standard", "executionTimeTodo": "pin Practical-RIFE commit SHA + confirm weights layout"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: On-pod RIFE runtime + server /interpolate endpoints
tasks.description:
**Goal:** _runtime.py renders schedule→mp4 at output_fps; ln.py /interpolate + status endpoints mirror /upscale. Files: interpolators/rife/_runtime.py, engines/diffusers/servers/ln.py + tests/interpolators/test_rife_runtime.py. Verify: pixi run pytest tests/interpolators/test_rife_runtime.py -v. READ ln.py /upscale block first.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/interpolators/rife/_runtime.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/servers/ln.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/interpolators/test_rife_runtime.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["runtime renders schedule to mp4, decimate-only-when-set", "server endpoints mirror /upscale", "offline fake-model asserts count+fps"], "modelTier": "complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Example config + RED live-smoke scaffold (commit before spend)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** interpolate-only cfg + gated RED live smoke, committed before spend (CLAUDE.md durability). Files: examples/configs/interpolate-rife-60fps.yaml, tests/live/test_rife_interpolate_live.py. Verify: pixi run pytest tests/live/test_rife_interpolate_live.py -v → SKIPPED; pixi run preflight → 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/interpolate-rife-60fps.yaml", "tests/live/test_rife_interpolate_live.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_rife_interpolate_live.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cfg cloud_type secure", "live test gated/SKIPPED", "drives CLI on 480 fixture asserting fps==60 + clean ledger"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Live smoke + frame-QA + successful-generations entry
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Run RIFE interpolate-only live smoke, frame-QA before green, verify teardown, log generation. Files: successful-generations.md, tests/live/evidence/. Verify: KINOFORGE_LIVE=1 pixi run pytest tests/live/test_rife_interpolate_live.py -v → 1 passed; kinoforge list → no instances.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["successful-generations.md", "tests/live/evidence/"], "verifyCommand": "KINOFORGE_LIVE=1 pixi run pytest tests/live/test_rife_interpolate_live.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["preflight exit 0 before spend", "1 passed + captured stdout", "fps==60 + duration within 1 frame", "frame-QA verdict recorded before green", "pod destroyed + ledger clean", "successful-generations entry"], "modelTier": "complex", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requiresUserSpecification": false, "gateScope": "live-smoke", "failurePolicy": "stop"}
```
